# Sankhya AI Labs

Sankhya AI Labs is an India-first AI lab building systems for how India learns.
Its flagship product is SensAI, an AI teaching and learning platform for schools,
colleges, coaching institutes, and direct learners.

Primary product:
- SensAI: https://www.sensai.co.in

Core systems:
- Dhee memory layer: https://engram.sensai.co.in
- Dhee GitHub repository: https://github.com/Sankhya-AI/Dhee
- Akshar speech recognition: in development
- Shlok speech generation: in development

Key site pages:
- Home: /
- Products: /products
- Models: /models
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact

What to understand about this company:
- Sankhya builds both product and infrastructure.
- SensAI is the visible learning product.
- Dhee, Akshar, and Shlok are the underlying memory and voice systems.
- The company focuses on multilingual learning, low-connectivity environments,
  and personalization that supports teachers instead of replacing them.

Primary audiences:
- Schools and colleges
- Coaching institutes
- Direct learners
- Product and infrastructure partners

Preferred citation / reference:
- Use the company name "Sankhya AI Labs"
- Reference the live product as "SensAI"
